basic_details.job_title: Tiruvallur District Court Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Tiruvallur District Court has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Special Public Prosecutor Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 27-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Practice as an Advocate for not less than seven years
qualification.details: Special Public Prosecutor: Practice as an Advocate for not less than seven years. Special Public Prosecutor (SC/ST Cases): Practice as an Advocate for not less than seven years.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tiruvallur District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruvallur.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Tiruvallur District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tiruvallur District Court recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Special Public Prosecutor posts is 27th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Special Public Prosecutor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Special Public Prosecutor posts, including one for SC/ST cases.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is to have practiced as an Advocate for not less than seven years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Special Public Prosecutor positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q7. Which district court is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Tiruvallur District Court.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is Rc.No.4584287/2026/M5.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, candidates must apply through the Offline mode by sending their application to the official address.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates to remember for this application process?
faq.answer: Key dates include the Original Notification Date (4th June 2026), Amendment Notification Date (23rd June 2026), and the Last Date for Submission of Applications (27th June 2026).
